value.found_quote: With the introduction of GPT-5, we added some checks to find and halt hazardous information from being accessed... We classify requests to GPT-5 into risk thresholds... Implement safety identifiers for products where individual users interact with a model... we run safety checks on our own models, including all fine-tuned models, and on the computer use tool... Cyber Safety... Fine-tuning safety... Safety checks in computer use
value.name: Safety classifiers for GPT-5 and forward
